protocol: Core Restore 14-day liver cleanse (Designs for Health)

phases.label: Pre-detox baseline
phases.notes: 27 days before Core Restore start. Standard eating, standard training, normal life.

phases.label: Core Restore (14d)
phases.notes: 14 consecutive days of the Core Restore protocol: AM + PM shake, elimination diet (no gluten, dairy, soy, corn, eggs, sugar, alcohol, caffeine), Designs for Health supplement stack.

phases.label: Post-detox clean
phases.notes: Single rest day before starting food reintroduction.

phases.label: Nightshade Trial 1
phases.notes: First food reintroduction trial (tomato / bell pepper / white potato / eggplant).
